results.rendered_html:
upa-√dru P. -dravati (aor. -adudrot,  RV. ) to run near or towards;
to run at, rush at, oppress, assault, attack,  RV. ii, 30, 3 ; iv, 16, 1 ;  AV. vii, 73, 6 ; xviii, 2, 23 ;  TS. ;  ChUp. ;
to sing the Upa-drava or fourth of the five parts of a Sāman stanza,  AitĀr. ii, 3, 4, 3.

results.rendered_html:
upadru 1 P.
1 To run near to, run towards;  Śi. 12. 42. 
2 To attack, assault, rush at; tamupādravadudyamya dakṣiṇaṃ dorniśācaraḥ  R. 15. 23 ; prāgjyotiṣamupādravat  Mb.
